scripts.dev:macos:stable: APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY="Diff Forge AI Local Development" tauri dev
scripts.build:macos:stable: APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY="Diff Forge AI Local Development" tauri build --bundles app
scripts.package:macos:stable: APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY="Diff Forge AI Local Development" tauri build --bundles app
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:rust
scripts.test:frontend: node --test src/tokenomics/tokenomicsFormat.test.js src/notifications/workspaceNotifications.test.js src/terminals/providerTurnIntent.test.js src/terminals/terminalActivityState.test.js src/terminals/terminalColors.test.js src/terminals/terminalPromptSubmission.test.js src/terminals/todoQueueLaneState.test.js src/terminals/todoQueueScheduler.test.js src/terminals/todoQueueSources.test.js src/threads/threadTerminalGroundTruth.test.js src/threads/workspaceThreadTranscriptEvidence.test.js src/threads/workspaceThreads.test.js
scripts.tauri:dev:macos:stable: APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY="Diff Forge AI Local Development" tauri dev
scripts.tauri:dev:existing:macos:stable: APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY="Diff Forge AI Local Development" tauri dev --config src-tauri/tauri.dev.conf.json --no-dev-server-wait
